scripts.postinstall: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
scripts.actions:build: bunx ncc build .github/actions/nightly/src/index.ts -o .github/actions/nightly/dist && bunx ncc build .github/actions/docker-smoke-test/src/index.ts -o .github/actions/docker-smoke-test/dist && bunx ncc build .github/actions/morning-contribution/src/index.ts -o .github/actions/morning-contribution/dist
scripts.contributor:dev:anthropic: cd apps/example && env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_MAILTO -u SEARXNG_URL bun --env-file=../../.env.morning-contributor run start:anthropic
scripts.contributor:dev:cursor: cd apps/example && env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_MAILTO -u SEARXNG_URL bun --env-file=../../.env.morning-contributor run start:cursor
scripts.contributor:dev:openai: cd apps/example && env -u OPENAI_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_MAILTO -u SEARXNG_URL bun --env-file=../../.env.morning-contributor run start:openai
